query: double exposure photograph overlapping ghostly silhouette portrait
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / double_exposure: ghostly overlapping portraits, multi-exposure

response.objective_caption: A black-and-white photograph showing a person walking along a sidewalk in front of a large advertisement or billboard. The billboard displays an oversized close-up of a woman's legs wearing high-heeled shoes and a handbag. The person on the sidewalk is a woman with short hair, wearing a patterned dress and white shoes, captured mid-stride.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black-and-white photograph with surreal layered composition, combining a woman walking along a sidewalk with an enormous advertisement of legs and shoes superimposed over the scene through double exposure or reflection. The image uses extreme scale juxtaposition—monumentally enlarged billboard legs dwarfing the pedestrian below—along with harsh high-contrast lighting that crushes blacks and blows out whites, creating an uncanny, dreamlike atmosphere where real and artificial spaces collide.
